motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def findKthNumber(self, n: int, k: int) -> int:
        node = 1
        k -= 1
        while k > 0:
            children = self.countChildren(node, n)
            if k >= children:
                k -= children
                node *= 10
            else:
                node += k // (n - node + 1)
                k = 1
        return node
    def countChildren(self, node, n):
        count = 0
        node_str = str(node)
        for i in range(len(node_str)):
            if i == len(node_str) - 1:
                count += n - int(node_str[:i+1]) + 1
            else:
                count += int(str(node_str[:i+1]) + '9') - int(node_str[:i+1])
        return count
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n + log k)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
